title: Chai's Elytra Enchants
description: Adds two new treasure enchantments for the elytra, skipping and launch!
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/sMlQWlw.png)

## About

Chai's Elytra Enchants adds two new treasure enchantments for the elytra, skipping and launch!

## Skipping

This enchantment only has one level, and it lets you bounce off the floor when you hold jump. It's a lot of fun to skip across the terrain, and you can even gain speed this way too!

![](https://imgur.com/jMWf52h.gif)

## Launch

This enchantment has three levels, and each higher level gives you a faster launch speed when you deploy your elytra.

Level I can give ~5 blocks of height, lvl II can give ~8 blocks of height, and lvl III can give ~11 blocks of height.

![](https://i.imgur.com/5sgl1uG.gif)

## Supported Languages

- Chilean Spanish (Mudkip)
- English
- Mexican Spanish (cerealconjugo)
- Simplified Chinese (painting11)
